mapper.select:
select dept_id, parent_id, ancestors, dept_code, dept_name, leader, phone, sort_no, status, remark from sys_dept where deleted = 0
and dept_name like concat('%', #{query.deptName}, '%')
and status = #{query.status}
order by sort_no asc, dept_id asc

select dept_id, parent_id, ancestors, dept_code, dept_name, leader, phone, sort_no, status, remark from sys_dept where deleted = 0
and dept_name like concat('%', #{query.deptName}, '%')
and status = #{query.status}
order by sort_no asc, dept_id asc
select count(1) from sys_dept where parent_id = #{deptId} and deleted = 0
select count(1) from sys_user where dept_id = #{deptId} and deleted = 0
mapper.update: update sys_dept set ancestors = regexp_replace(ancestors, concat('^', #{oldPrefix}), #{newPrefix}) where ancestors like concat(#{oldPrefix}, '%') and deleted = 0
